title: LIHEAP - 211info
text: WILLAMALANE ADULT ACTIVITY CENTER LIHEAP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides winter warming and summer cooling utility assistance, including electric, natural gas, and heating fuel. All assistance is through a waitlist. Assistance is not guaranteed. 215 W C Street Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: -Must be age 60 years or older -Most programs: 60% of Area Median Income Hours: -Waitlist enrollment is ongoing and open monthly starting Monday, January 5, 2026 until capacity is reached -Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm (541) 736-4406 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 736-4406 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to be added to the waitlist FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance * Older Adults Gas Service Payment Assistance * Older Adults Heating Fuel Payment Assistance * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SENIOR CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WILLAMALANE ADULT ACTIVITY CENTER
